content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "String Task". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/118/A
constraints: s contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single string s, which contains only lowercase English letters.
content.outputFormat: Print the string with all vowels removed, and the remaining letters in the same order, but with all letters converted to lowercase and with the first letter of each word capitalized.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a loop to iterate over the input string, and for each character, check if it is a vowel. If it is not a vowel, add it to the result string. After that, split the result string into words and capitalize the first letter of each word.
